sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105292" key="trisxhma/tistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρι-σχημάτιστος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <sense id="n105292.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trischematisti dactylici,</tr_> series of two dactyls and one spondee <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">capable of being arranged in three orders,</tr_> Sacerd.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0022.tlg001:p.506K" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.506K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
